overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a Ravenclaw student walking through a snow-covered Gothic covered bridge at Hogwarts, transitioning from the wooden interior to an open stone courtyard with a large ornate fountain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered Gothic viaduct with wooden beam ceiling and stone tracery windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered bridge wearing dark robes and a blue and gold striped Ravenclaw scarf

entered.detail: dark wooden beam ceiling with triangular trusses creating a tunnel effect
stone walls with pointed Gothic windows and ornate stone tracery
stone walls with pointed Gothic windows and ornate stone tracery
snow-covered stone path with visible footprints
ornate iron lanterns suspended from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered Gothic walkway with a dark wooden vaulted ceiling and stone walls featuring pointed arch windows. Sunlight filters through the tracery creating patterns on the snow-covered path. The corridor is empty and quiet, with ornate iron lanterns hanging from the beams above.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway exit leading to open courtyard with ornate central fountain

events.description: character exits the covered wooden bridge into the open stone courtyard

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the wooden roof ends, emerging into the open courtyard with a large ornate fountain structure visible ahead

entered.detail: heavy stone archway marking the transition from covered bridge to open courtyard
large multi-tiered stone fountain visible through the archway ahead
snow-covered dormant bushes lining the exit path
snow-covered dormant bushes lining the exit path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered bridge through a heavy stone archway into a sunlit open courtyard. The wooden ceiling and lanterns are left behind as the space opens up to reveal a large ornate fountain structure ahead. Snow covers the ground and dormant bushes line the path as the character approaches the courtyard center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed intimacy of a Gothic walkway into the expansive brightness of a snow-covered courtyard. It begins within a covered bridge, moving beneath a dark wooden vaulted ceiling where sunlight filters through pointed arch windows to cast patterns across the snowy path. As the character advances past hanging iron lanterns and stone walls, the enclosed space narrows toward a heavy stone archway. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera emerges from the bridge, leaving the wooden interior behind for a wide, sunlit exterior. Finally, the view expands across the frozen ground and dormant bushes, drawing closer to a large ornate fountain at the center of the courtyard.
